name: LPI Multi-Agent System
description: A Level 4 multi-agent system where a decision agent generates deployment strategies using grounded evidence provided by a specialized grounding agent.

agents.description: Generates constraint-aware deployment strategies using structured reasoning, SMILE methodology, and grounded inputs
Extracts, filters, and validates insights, case studies, and knowledge to provide high-quality evidence for decision-making

orchestrator.description: Coordinates agents, manages structured data exchange, and combines outputs into a final deployment strategy
